title: Call to Battle WW2
description: Call to Battle WWII takes you back to the second world war with over 300 guns, around 100 maps, vehicles, and much more! Experience World War Two!
body:
![Call to Battle WW2 Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7574e3821ff263123d2332039a6abcd485bc0e9f.png)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567b4066ce706dc81c95a21a12fa402b02b88a7a.png)

# Experience the Second World War

Striving for a immersive infantry experience, Call to Battle presents detailed models and combat mechanics.

Here's some of what it has to offer!

- Over 300 Guns
- Vehicles including Jeeps and Trucks
- 15 Different Nations and factions
- Many classes to choose from
- Official server with close to 100 maps
